review_title: SFTP To Go is a WIN!
description: The team at SFTP To Go is great. They are attentive, open to new ideas and always ready to engage and help. Building great software is getting easier and easier, but building a great company is rare and I can definitely recommend the team to anyone considering cloud storage needs.
author: Gavin H.
pros: The user interface to manage the environment is really next level. It is well designed for both new and pro users. The flexibility of control with branding, user creation, quotas and other advanced features are really a step ahead.
cons: I don't really have any big negatives about the product. I've been using SFTP for 25 years, from command line interfaces on self hosted platforms to other vendors and this product is superior.

review_title: An Excellent and Inexpensive Cloud-Based SFTP Server
description: We've been using SFTP To Go for a little over a year to support file-based integrations with a variety of applications that we use to good success. These exchanges run multiple times daily and the product has worked flawlessly. Compatibility hasn't been an issue, unlike another product that we tried. Overall I find it a good product at a good price.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's very easy to use. We purchased it, set it up, and began using it all in the same afternoon. The interface is intuitive, if a little dated looking.
cons: The documentation was a little unclear in certain areas. But a quick email to their support team (who responded quickly) cleared up my questions and got us on track.

description: SFTP To Go covers all of our needs and was easy to setup. Management of the site is easy. Site navigation is easy, http feature is easy to use.
author: Jonathan N.
pros: Very easy to use, low learning time. Product comes in a much lower price point than competition. Would recommend.
cons: I can't think of anything that we didn't like about the product. At 1st we were concerned a little since it was cheaper than competition however those concerns were quickly proven false as it does everything we asked.

review_title: Perfect for Starter Projects and Quick Deployments
description: I found it very nice for a temporary solution (that for some people and projects could very well be a long term solution), which was very easy to throw in to see how the rest of my application functions.
author: Jackson F.
pros: It was incredibly quick to set up, only taking about 10 minutes.
cons: The scaling up process seems a bit pricey, but given the simplicity, I think it makes sense.

review_title: Great Service at a great value!
description: Overall, SFTP To Go has been an excellent solution for our needs and a product we genuinely enjoy using. The platform delivers strong value, reliability, and performance, and despite minor administrative quirks, it consistently does what we need it to do. Most importantly, the support team is outstanding—helpful, knowledgeable, and quick to respond—making the overall experience extremely positive and easy to recommend.
author: Topher A.
pros: SFTP To Go provides excellent value for the cost and is extremely easy to set up and use, even with minimal configuration. Storage capacity has never been an issue for our needs, and the service has been consistently reliable. Their support team is responsive and helpful, making the overall experience very positive.
cons: The main drawback is administration, as some configuration options are confusing or not particularly useful in practice. The management interface can be difficult to navigate at times, which makes routine tasks take longer than expected. Additionally, email notification rules do not always function consistently, requiring manual verification instead of relying fully on alerts.

description: Overall the positives greatly outweigh the negatives. SFTP To Go is the best SFTP environment that I have ever used.
author: Isaac C.
pros: Ease of use was huge, prior to using SFTP To Go we needed to have an entire IT team help set up SFTP folders for us. We would have to request the IT team update things such as folder names, new folders, deleting folders, but now that we use SFTP To Go I can handle all of those things myself!
cons: The one thing that gets on my nerves about SFTP To Go is that there is no way to sort the files within the folders of the SFTP. We utilize the SFTP for pharmaceutical claims, and I grab the new document each week, but there is not way to sort newest document to oldest or anything like that, which makes finding each document a little trickier.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Eric K.
pros: it's a super easy cloud based SFTP server, built on buckets that are also accessible programatically, and webhook integration to aid in automation.
cons: I think it's just extending features that already exist - extended history for webhook deliveries, better searching/filtering for failures, etc.

review_title: SFTP TO Go simple answer YES!
description: The experience is very good and we are considering going up and scale up the service for other services of the platform.
author: Mario G.
pros: Ease to use and very good support and 24/7 because we are in Argentina and the company is in Israel.
cons: They solve all the automatic clear of the files they take care of the program at no extra cost and included in the plan.

description: Meeting with the sales team and the support from the support team combined really gave us a great experience and will continue to do business.
author: Joseph T.
pros: I love the scalability of the service and the affordability of the services. The support is also very good.
cons: Honestly the only thing to complain about is it took a little to get the billing straightened out. Other than that all good.

review_title: Great product for your storage needs
description: So far everything is great. Happy with the service and customer service support. Price is great and affordable for small business like mine.
author: Vishesh M.
pros: Ease of use and value for money. Best solution for small businesses looking for a secured file storage and sharing service.
cons: Possibly a little bit more nicer interface and file management. More intuitiveness will go a long way for someone looking to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We use SFTP to GO for daily file exchange between clients and vendors and, to date, we have had no issues. Much, much better than our previous provider.
author: Dan C.
pros: Very easy to configure with intuitive interface
cons: Nothing. It fits our needs very well and is easy to use.

description: Overall, the service team has been great to work with and once we had setup complete it has gone smoothly.
author: Mitchelle H.
pros: Easy to find necessary files, upload and download as needed.
cons: Setting up users, we have some internal that need to access different files and haven't got that setup yet.

description: Overall great, easy to use product with expected security capabilities
author: Peter S.
pros: Ease of Setup API Capable Good Capability for Pricing
cons: You do have to pay up to get branding capabilities

description: SFTP To Go has a low cost entry with a simple user interface that is perfect for our needs.
author: David H.
pros: The pricing model is aligned with the value added.
cons: I don't have any negative feedback for this product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: As I said before, SFTP to go is a secure SAAS software, who gaves us the posibility to scale in volume of transactions, without an increase of price.
author: Felipe A.
pros: It is very useful to our company, because we need security and availability for a good price and easy use.
cons: We need the SAAS in Spanish. We are from Chile and some collaborators doesn't manage the English language.

description: I've really enjoyed my experience with SFTP To Go and I hope that I am able incorporate it into my businesses resources in the future. (Also, a shout-out to [sensitive content hidden] for the guided walk-through and for giving me a great intro experience!)
author: Colin W.
pros: My favorite feature with SFTP To Go was it's accessibility across multiple platforms. Whether it was accessing the server on a new/temporary computer or integrating with a trusted desktop client (which is my preference).
cons: The price point compared to the features needed. To be clear, I am not saying that SFTP To Go is over priced. I'm only saying that even the lowest tier is beyond my current budget. (Although I hope this isn't the case for too much longer)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very smooth onboarding, great support and overall easy to set up. Our clients like it as well so thats a plus.
author: Joe T.
pros: Its very easy to use. I like that I can create separate folders for each client and then track what is coming in.
cons: Not the cheapest but if you want a solution that is enterprise ready, this will definitely get you what you need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great experience with SFTP to GO!
description: Our experience was great, they helped set up our environment from scratch and we achieved what we wanted in no time.
author: Martin B.
pros: I loved the how easy was to setup it and the support provided
cons: There was just a con in the configuration aspect that I can't remember now, but it wasn't a deal breaker. We managed to work around it with the help of the support.

description: Positive. Great support and customer service.
author: Joe K.
pros: Ease of use and setup. Everything was super simple and very user friendly.
cons: Nothing. It works exactly how we hoped it would.
author_profession: Assistant director of facilities and IT

description: It is a great resource for file exchange, and they provide excellent and expedite support.
author: RICARDO S.
pros: It is a 100% reliable platform and they offer a very professional support.
cons: Everything is good with SFTP To Go, we are satisfied with their service.

review_title: Nice Product and easy to use.
description: Working with testing it was easy. Needed more time and they extended my trial.
author: Jeffrey G.
pros: Very Easy to work with. Control panel nice and easy to download.
cons: Price is a little high. But the having FTP is worth it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ryan M.
pros: very easy to set up, use, and share with all of our partners we need to share files with. setup and starting to use the product took less than a day to be fully integrated
cons: no support for a pricing tier for small usage with only 1 or 2 credentials while expanding business to more partners
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kai R.
pros: The setup process was straightforward and intuitive, with easy-to-follow guides and responsive customer support to help with any questions. Once I got everything set up, the service just worked seamlessly, with fast upload speeds and reliable storage.
cons: I’m really disappointed with the storage limits. The service offers a very low storage allowance compared to other providers, and it quickly became a problem as my data grew.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent service that can reliably be used as part of a broader system
author: Charlie O.
pros: Very easy to set up and has been extremely reliable for my team over the course of ~5 years. We have not had a single issue with downtime or data loss that I can recall.
cons: It used to be tightly coupled to Heroku, but that has been resolved and it now has its own platform for sign up and billing.

review_title: Straightforward, Reliable and Just What We Needed
description: We needed a reliable FTP solution to replace our current vendor and I came across their product in the marketplace for Heroku. It was very fast to set up and configure and, since then, we've had no issues with our SFTP product. I couldn't be happier with the reliability and ease of use/configuration
author: Jim Y.
pros: The setup was quite easy and that was a joy, but the webhooks are a feature we really found useful and use a lot to automate some document transfer and translation that can't be done any other way.
cons: The tiers available to us through Heroku jump quite significantly in cost from gold to platinum, I would have liked a few more options to pay more, but to pay just for the features I most needed.
